title: Evangelion 30 running time
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion 3.0 running time Post by Amitch1991 » Sun Jun 24, 2012 4:08 am I was just on the wiki page for Evangelion 3.0 and i noticed that the running time for the movie was at "118 Mins", is this something that has been confirmed or is this a rumor like the October release date was ?

[]: Post by Jadley » Sun Jun 24, 2012 4:33 am Dude i read the title and i had a little heartattack........ dunno if it's fake or not ...... but shouldn't the main website or the facebook page give any hints beforehand?.

[]: Post by Amitch1991 » Sun Jun 24, 2012 4:51 am yeah, the main website should update first, umm... it might be fake to be honest, the October release date was, i'll keep an eye on it

[]: Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Sun Jun 24, 2012 7:07 am 118 = Longest Eva Movie Yet. But then, all of the new movies were longer than the 87 minute long The End of Evangelion . (Strange.... it felt longer than that.) Given that this film is supposed to be released this fall, I guess some sort of running time for the movie can be estimated based on the current edit. I would assume khara is just sprucing up effect shots at this point, not changing the length and number of shots of the movie. But then, I can't seem to find an official source for this information, so who knows at this point.

[]: Post by Amitch1991 » Sun Jun 24, 2012 7:17 am FreakyFilmFan4ever wrote: 118 = Longest Eva Movie Yet. But then, all of the new movies were longer than the 87 minute long The End of Evangelion . (Strange.... it felt longer than that.) Given that this film is supposed to be released this fall, I guess some sort of running time for the movie can be estimated based on the current edit. I would assume khara is just sprucing up effect shots at this point, not changing the length and number of shots of the movie. But then, I can't seem to find an official source for this information , so who knows at this point.

[]: Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Jun 24, 2012 10:02 am There's a fake Youtube trailer (fanmade) that gives an October 2012 release date, I'm assuming the running time comes from that source or something similar. We haven't heard anything official yet.

[]: Post by Amitch1991 » Sun Jun 24, 2012 2:32 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: There's a fake Youtube trailer (fanmade) that gives an October 2012 release date, I'm assuming the running time comes from that source or something similar. We haven't heard anything official yet.

[]: Post by Ornette » Sun Jun 24, 2012 2:44 pm It was added to the wiki page 2 days ago, from a IE ip address. Since the talk page seems to be locked in move request, no info about where it came from

[]: Post by Amitch1991 » Sun Jun 24, 2012 2:52 pm I'm pretty skeptical about this, any news that's not from Gainax or Studio Khara is dodgy, seeing as how niether of those 2 organisations have made any official announcement, i'm gonna take it as fake

[]: Evangelion 3.0 will have a 120 minutes runtime Post by Hyper Shinchan » Fri Aug 17, 2012 8:48 am http://www.crunchyroll.com/anime-news/2012/08/17-1/120-minute-run-time-listed-for-evangelion-30 Well, I just read this on /m/, if it's not worth its own thread please merge it with the appropriate one. It's no way near "The Disappearance of Haruhi Suzumiya" but still...

[]: Post by Blue Monday » Fri Aug 17, 2012 8:55 am Yeah, the below thread has 118 minutes posted: http://forum.evageeks.org/thread/12890/Evangelion-30-running-time/ So they may be from the same source... Maybe.

[]: Post by EvaBrothers » Fri Aug 17, 2012 9:00 am It's a long running time. But for a very detailed work, looks like a good compromise. Many good movies are about that length. :)

[]: Post by Fireball » Fri Aug 17, 2012 10:04 am I'm okay with this.

[]: Post by Hyper Shinchan » Fri Aug 17, 2012 10:04 am Blue Monday wrote: Yeah, the below thread has 118 minutes posted: http://forum.evageeks.org/thread/12890/Evangelion-30-running-time/ So they may be from the same source... Maybe.

[]: Post by Gendo'sPapa » Fri Aug 17, 2012 10:21 am (said in my best Mr. Burns voice): Excellent!

[]: Post by Fireball » Fri Aug 17, 2012 10:33 am 12 more minutes of meaningful stare downs.

[]: Post by Hyper Shinchan » Fri Aug 17, 2012 10:52 am Fireball wrote: 12 more minutes of meaningful stare downs.

[]: Post by riffraff11235 » Fri Aug 17, 2012 11:41 am Gendo'sPapa wrote: (said in my best Mr. Burns voice): Excellent!

[]: Post by TheFriskyIan » Fri Aug 17, 2012 12:51 pm Weren't the last two movies nearing two hours? I kind of assumed that this was going to be standard for 3.0.

[]: Post by Ornette » Fri Aug 17, 2012 12:55 pm The TOHO Cinemas page was updated with a disclaimer, saying that the movie may not actually be 120min. Blue Monday wrote: Yeah, the below thread has 118 minutes posted: http://forum.evageeks.org/thread/12890/Evangelion-30-running-time/ So they may be from the same source... Maybe.
